mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPLY (C_NUMBER, COMMENTS, C_DATE, P_NUMBER, USER_ID, C_STATUS) VALUES (SEQ_REPLY.NEXTVAL, #{comments}, SYSDATE, #{pNumber}, #{userId}, default)
mapper.select: SELECT R.C_NUMBER, R.COMMENTS, TO_CHAR(R.C_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') C_DATE, R.P_NUMBER, R.USER_ID, U.USER_NAME, R.C_STATUS FROM REPLY R JOIN USERS U ON (R.USER_ID = U.USER_ID) WHERE R.P_NUMBER = #{pNumber} AND R.C_STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY R.C_NUMBER DESC

SELECT R.C_NUMBER, R.COMMENTS, TO_CHAR(R.C_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') C_DATE, R.P_NUMBER, R.USER_ID, U.USER_NAME, R.C_STATUS FROM REPLY R JOIN USERS U ON (R.USER_ID = U.USER_ID) WHERE R.C_NUMBER = #{cNumber}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RN, A.* FROM ( SELECT R.C_NUMBER, R.COMMENTS, TO_CHAR(R.C_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') C_DATE, R.P_NUMBER, R.USER_ID, U.USER_NAME, R.C_STATUS FROM REPLY R JOIN USERS U ON R.USER_ID = U.USER_ID ORDER BY R.C_NUMBER DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE RN >= #{startRow}
